content.en:
"It's coming!"

Ye Tian looked over.

A large number of Blood Kun Clans came, and there were several Blood Kun Masters of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm alone, several Boundary-Breaking Geniuses of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm, and primeval-level geniuses of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, and so on.

It can be said that such a scale is enough to destroy many forces.

Even the Eternal Great Ape Clan would be easily wiped out by this force!

"Release our blood kun clansmen!"

One of the Blood Kuns commanded.

"Take out some of the source stones from the other side, and I'll release them!"

Ye Tian said.

In his opinion, the Blood Kun Clan is not weak, and there may be a little bit of the source stone on the other side, so it is not bad to take the opportunity to exchange these Blood Kun people for the source stone on the other side.

"Want the source stone on the other side?"

These Blood Kun Clan were furious.

In their opinion, shouldn't Ye Tian surrender on his knees, and even dare to make a request, it is simply looking for death!

Abrupt.

A Blood Kun of the Ninth Bone Transformation Realm made a move, and directly performed some kind of imprisoning technique.

Airplanes!!!!

This technique ignored the distance and directly acted on Ye Tian's body, trying to restrain Ye Tian.

In this way, the other blood kun could snatch the blood kun that was caught by Ye Tian, and then kill Ye Tian.

In short, their plan was perfect, but they only underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

"Broken!"

The confinement was forcibly broken by Ye Tian.

Immediately.

He stretched out a finger and cast a magic spell on the other side - the golden mangs on the other side!

His right arm was already incarnated by the golden body on the other side, and with the blessing of the golden mangs on the other side, the power of this blow was terrifying.

Even if he only had six Bone Transformation Realm cultivations, the power of this blow was not something that ordinary Nine Bone Transformation Realms could withstand, a single blow could severely damage the existence of the Nine Bone Transformation Realms, and only a Boundary-Breaking Genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realms could resist it.

Saw.

The Nine Bone Transformation Realm that shot tried to resist, but was pierced through his body by the golden mangs on the other side.

"The !!!! of the genius of the other side"

The expressions of all the Blood Kuns changed drastically.

What they are afraid of is not the strength of the geniuses on the other side, but the background!

Ordinary forces can't cultivate a genius at all, and Ye Tian is a genius at the other side, which is enough to prove that his background is not simple.

That's when it happened.

The Blood Kun Clan sensed that a strong man had descended here, and they became solemn one by one.

Click!!!

The void cracked, and a bone transformation descended.

Among them, there are even boundary-breaking geniuses of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, whose strength has caused all the Blood Kun Clan to change drastically.

Because, they knew this boundary-breaking genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm.

"I've seen the Supreme Lord!"

They all said respectfully.

However, this Supreme Lord ignored them, and instead greeted Ye Tian one after another along with the other bone transformation realms.

"Lord!"

"Lord!"

"Lord!"

These bone transformation realms are all under Ye Tian's command, and they are the envoys and patrol envoys under the command of Gu Heng Mountain.

Among them, the Extreme Lord is a sixth-level Venerable Envoy, and he is only one step away from becoming a Venerable Lord, but his strength is still a little worse, and his merit is a little worse.

After Ye Tian became a genius on the other side, this supreme lord mainly took refuge and was willing to be under his command, just optimistic about Ye Tian's future!

Lord !!!

Hearing such a title, where did those blood kun not know Ye Tian's identity!

Gu Heng Mountain Lord, the other side level genius!

It was rumored that Gu Heng Mountain had given birth to a new genius of the other side, and they had also heard of it, but the specific situation was not clear.

I didn't expect to offend this other side genius so quickly!

This is the other side of Gu Heng Mountain, where is what their blood Kun clan can provoke!

If Gu Heng Mountain moved his fingers, he could wipe out the Blood Kun clan.

Immediately, they trembled.

"Endless Lord, our Blood Kun clan is wrong, we are going to take out all the source stones of the other side, and honor you, what do you think?" said the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Blood Kun.

"Okay, send the stuff here, and this matter is over!"

said.

He released all the bone transformation realm blood kun in his hand.

He believed that the Blood Kun Ancestor would never dare to offend him, otherwise the Blood Kun Clan would not have a better time in the future.

Subsequently.

All of these blood kun were withdrawn, and they ran extremely fast.

"Go back!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

"Yes!"

The Supreme Lord answered the way, and then departed one by one.

The Lord of the Ruins was stunned this time, and the Bone Transformation Realm existences whose aura was terrifying to the extreme just now turned out to be Ye Tian's subordinates.

Ye Tian entered the land of eternity at about the same time as him, but he mixed so badly, but Ye Tian mixed so well, he must have joined some incomparably terrifying huge force.

Why is the gap so big!

Of course, he was not jealous!

He knew very well that Ye Tian was able to use the cultivation of the six Bone Transformation Realm to injure the Blood Kun of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, this was definitely not an ancient-level genius.

Just now, that Blood Kun mentioned the other side-level genius, although he didn't know what the other shore-level genius was, it was definitely extremely rare.

"After this matter is over, let's find out what a genius is on the other side!"

The Lord of the Ruins thought to himself.

When the incident had passed, he went back.

Although his identity was revealed this time, there was nothing wrong with it.

After all, as there are more and more bone changes in the boundary of the territorial waters, it will definitely enter the land of eternity in the future, and it will still be exposed at that time.

Moreover, he has now joined Gu Heng Mountain, and with Gu Heng Mountain as a backer, he is not afraid of exposure.

It didn't take long.

The Blood Kun clan honestly sent some source stones from the other side, the number was not much, only more than thirty, but it was quite good.

The Blood Kun clan did not have a genius of the other side, so they did not deliberately collect the source stones of the other side.

In addition, some of the source stones on the other side were traded, so only these source stones on the other side were left.

"That's right, it can be used to cultivate for a while!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The other side.

The Lord of the Ruins ran to the Eternal Ancient Demon City to inquire about the geniuses on the other side.

Soon, he learned the information of the other side level genius from a well-informed bone transformation realm.

"The other side level genius is the existence that surpasses the primeval level genius, there are only a few other side level geniuses in this territory, and the number is too rare. And the strength of the other side level genius is very strong, and he can fight across three realms. "

After the Lord of the Ruins continued to understand, he knew how awesome Ye Tian was.

Only forces like Gu Demon Sea and Gu Heng Mountain have a genius on the other side, and other forces have not heard of having a genius on the other side.

Many forces have been cultivating for countless years, but they have not been able to cultivate a genius of the other side, and even many primeval-level geniuses have fallen and died in order to become a genius of the other side, among which there are some peerless geniuses and peerless demons, but they have all fallen one by one.

"Endless Lord, that's awesome!"

The Lord of the Ruins sighed.
